scope: Capability-facing comparison between canonical API2 tid=535 and alternate positive tids 540/541 using current live evidence
verdict: Current live evidence supports reading `535/540/541` as the same positive-family at the branch level, but not yet as field-equivalent detail modes.
Canonical `tid=535` has already been validated on the public Python and Go demos with a full detail row on `z4102qfi0x4`, including duration, defn, state, and upload_src.

Alternate `tid=540` now has a 3-public-VID richness matrix plus Go spotcheck confirmation: the tested rows kept `retcode=0`, non-empty title, duration, and url, but stayed structurally thin with `richness_score=3` and empty `defn/state/upload_src/category_map/cover_list/vwh`.

Alternate `tid=541` now has a 3-public-VID richness matrix plus Go spotcheck confirmation: when the request succeeds, the row stays even thinner with `richness_score=2`, title and url present, and duration/defn/state/upload_src/category_map/cover_list/vwh all empty.

A new anonymous `union_platform` sweep across `""/0/1/2/3/4/8/9/-1/999/0003` on `tid=535/540/541` did not enrich the thin `540/541` rows on the tested public vids, so the current best reading is that the field split is not explained by `union_platform` inside the present anonymous direct-access scope.
Therefore `tid=540` and `tid=541` should currently be documented as valid alternate positive shells, not as drop-in guarantees of the same field fullness as canonical `tid=535`.

alternate_540_thin_positive_shell: examples/python/tencent_video_api_demo.py live runs on `z4102qfi0x4`, `j4101ouc4ve`, and `m4102tgsa8d` with `--api2-tid 540`
alternate_541_thin_positive_shell: examples/python/tencent_video_api_demo.py live runs on `z4102qfi0x4`, `j4101ouc4ve`, and `m4102tgsa8d` with `--api2-tid 541`

current_documentation_rule: Use `tid=535` as the canonical recipe default when the caller expects the strongest chance of a fuller detail row.
Expose `540/541` as alternate positive tids for branch-level verification and compatibility experiments.
Do not promise field-equivalence between `540/541` and `535`; document `540` and `541` separately when shell thickness matters.
remaining_open_questions: Whether `tid=540` can ever rise above the current score-3 shell on broader live samples or under different environments is still open.
Whether `tid=541` can ever rise above the current score-2 shell on broader live samples or under different environments is still open.
Whether any non-anonymous environment changes the current negative `union_platform` reading for `540/541` is still open.
